provisions.content:
ATT DWAR SERVIZZI INVESTMENT (ALTERNATIVE
INVESTMENT FUND MANAGER) (PASSPORT)

[ L.S.370.22

LEĠISLAZZJONI SUSSIDJARJA 370.22
REGOLAMENTI DWAR L-ATT DWAR SERVIZZI TA’
INVESTIMENT (ALTERNATIVE INVESTMENT FUND
MANAGER) (PASSPORT)*
22 ta’ Lulju, 2013
L-AVVIŻ LEGALI 114 tal-2013, u bl-Avviż Legali 404 tal-2017, 244 tal2019, 334 tal-2021, 147 tal-2023 u 60 tal-2025.

*Dawn ir-regolamenti ġew ippubblikati bl-ilsien Ingliż biss.

1
